subcodes.first_line: O radiant lamp that blazeth at the summit of thunderous, lightning-wreathed clouds! Praise be to God, thou art the object of His gracious regard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سراج اشراقی و در اوج سحاب ارعادی و ابراقی الحمد لله منظور نظر عنایتی و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
